title: Memory & Knowledge
description: Giving agents short-term context, long-term recall, and access to external knowledge

lessons.title: Why Memory Matters
lessons.description: The context window bottleneck and why agents need memory beyond a single turn

lessons.title: Conversation and Short-Term Memory
lessons.description: Managing conversation history, summarization, and sliding window strategies

lessons.title: Long-Term Memory
lessons.description: Persisting knowledge across sessions with vector stores and structured storage

lessons.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
lessons.description: Combining retrieval and generation to ground agents in factual knowledge

lessons.title: Embeddings and Vector Stores
lessons.description: How embeddings work, choosing vector databases, and indexing strategies

lessons.title: Advanced RAG Patterns
lessons.description: Hybrid search, reranking, query decomposition, and agentic RAG

lessons.title: Memory Lab
lessons.description: Hands-on: build an agent with conversation memory and RAG-powered knowledge
